description_long: This object is a modern, wall-mounted hand dryer with a smooth, curved exterior made primarily of white plastic. The front face is broad and slightly convex, featuring a small icon and text indicating hand placement for activation. The sides are gently sloped, blending seamlessly into the main body, and the overall form is compact and streamlined for public restroom use. The bottom edge houses the air outlet, which is subtly integrated and not immediately visible from the front. The surface is glossy and hard, reflecting ambient light and giving a clean, hygienic appearance. There are no visible buttons, suggesting automatic sensor activation.
description: A sleek, white, wall-mounted hand dryer with a curved, glossy plastic exterior and a subtle front icon for hand placement. The design is compact and modern, with a hidden air outlet underneath.
description_view_0: Front view shows a broad, curved face with a small icon and text near the bottom, indicating hand placement.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the smooth, sloped contour and the overall depth of the unit.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a flat, featureless surface, likely intended to be mounted flush against a wall.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same curved, streamlined profile.
attribute_brand_logo: A small icon and text are visible on the front, but the brand name is not clearly legible.
attribute_nozzle_design: single slot, downward-facing, integrated into the bottom edge
